test_cases.name: Login Page Rendering
test_cases.description: Verify login page loads with email and password inputs, submit button, and registration link

test_cases.name: Form Validation
test_cases.description: Verify validation messages appear for empty fields and invalid email format

test_cases.name: Invalid Credentials
test_cases.description: Verify appropriate error message when invalid credentials are submitted

test_cases.name: Successful Login
test_cases.description: Verify user is redirected to home page upon successful authentication

test_cases.name: Navigation
test_cases.description: Verify user can navigate to register page and back to login page

test_cases.name: Accessibility
test_cases.description: Verify keyboard navigation, ARIA labels, and focus management on login form

test_cases.name: Conversation List
test_cases.description: Verify conversation list displays correct number of conversations with participant names

test_cases.name: Logged-in User Display
test_cases.description: Verify the logged-in user's name is displayed in the conversation area

test_cases.name: Send Message
test_cases.description: Verify user can type and send a message, seeing it appear in the chat area

test_cases.name: Unread Badge
test_cases.description: Verify conversation with unread messages displays an unread count badge

test_cases.name: Search Conversations
test_cases.description: Verify search by participant name filters the conversation list correctly

test_cases.name: No Results Filter
test_cases.description: Verify search with non-matching text shows empty state with appropriate message

test_cases.name: Message Input Accessibility
test_cases.description: Verify message input has proper ARIA labels and keyboard support

test_cases.name: Back Navigation
test_cases.description: Verify user can return from conversation view to conversation list

test_cases.name: Listing Cards
test_cases.description: Verify listings page displays listing cards with title, price, location, and image

test_cases.name: Search Functionality
test_cases.description: Verify search input filters listings by title in real-time

test_cases.name: Category Filter
test_cases.description: Verify category dropdown filters listings by selected category

test_cases.name: Location Filter
test_cases.description: Verify location input filters listings by city

test_cases.name: Price Filter
test_cases.description: Verify price range inputs filter listings within specified range

test_cases.name: Empty State
test_cases.description: Verify appropriate empty state message when no listings match filters

test_cases.name: Listing Details
test_cases.description: Verify clicking a listing card navigates to detail page with full information

test_cases.name: Accessibility
test_cases.description: Verify listing cards have proper ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
